zh.Eastwell, Kent, England: 英國英格蘭肯特易亞斯特維爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joseph Lathrop於1624年4月11日在英國肯特易亞斯特維爾受洗時，他的父親John Lothrop39歲，母親Hannah Howse29歲。他於1650年12月11日與Mary Ansel在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1702年12月11日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波巴恩斯塔波享年78歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州巴恩斯塔波巴恩斯塔波洛斯羅普 希爾 其特利。

zh-hans.Eastwell, Kent, England: 英国英格兰肯特易亞斯特維爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joseph Lathrop于1624年4月11日在英国肯特易亞斯特維爾受洗时，他的父亲John Lothrop39岁，母亲Hannah Howse29岁。他于1650年12月11日与Mary Ansel在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1702年12月11日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波巴恩斯塔波享年78岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州巴恩斯塔波巴恩斯塔波洛斯羅普 希爾 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Lathrop
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of Laythorpe, a habitational name from Laythorpe, the former name of a settlement in Lincolnshire which is recorded as Ledulftorp in 1086 and Leilthorp in the 12th century. The placename derives from the Old Norse personal name Leithulfr + Old Norse thorp ‘secondary settlement, outlying farmstead’.

nameMeanings.name: Joseph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the biblical Hebrew name Yosef, meaning ‘(God) shall add (another son)’. This was borne by the favourite son of Jacob, whose brothers became jealous of him and sold him into slavery (Genesis 37). He was taken to Egypt, where he rose to become chief steward to Pharaoh, and was eventually reconciled to his brothers when they came to buy corn during a seven-year famine (Genesis 43–7). In the New Testament Joseph is the name of the husband of the Virgin Mary. It is also borne by a rich Jew, Joseph of Arimathea (Matthew 27:57; Mark 15:43; Luke 23:50; John 19:38), who took Jesus down from the Cross, wrapped him in a shroud, and buried him in a rock tomb. According to medieval legend, Joseph of Arimathea brought the Holy Grail to Britain. The name was uncommon in Britain in the Middle Ages but was revived in the mid 16th century and had become popular by the 1630s, remaining so ever since.

variants.name: Josef
meanings: , Dutch, Scandinavian, and Czech spelling of   Joseph  , now also in use in the English‐speaking world.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.
Oldest Grave Seen in the Memorials List

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Joseph Lathrop was christened on 11 April 1624, in Eastwell, Kent, England, his father, John Lothrop, was 39 and his mother, Hannah Howse, was 29. He married Mary Ansel on 11 December 1650, in Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 11 December 1702, in Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 78, and was buried in Lothrop Hill Cemetery, Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joseph Lathrop a été baptisé le 11 avril 1624, à Eastwell, Kent, Angleterre, son père, John Lothrop, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Hannah Howse, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Mary Ansel le 11 décembre 1650, à Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 11 décembre 1702, à Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à Lothrop Hill Cemetery, Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joseph Lathrop am 11. April 1624 in Eastwell, Kent, England getauft wurde, war sein Vater John Lothrop 39 und seine Mutter Hannah Howse 29. Er hat am 11. Dezember 1650 in Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America Mary Ansel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 11. Dezember 1702 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Lothrop Hill Cemetery, Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joseph Lathrop è stato battezzato il 11 aprile 1624 nel Eastwell, Kent, England, il suo padre, John Lothrop, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Hannah Howse, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Mary Ansel il 11 dicembre 1650, nel Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 11 dicembre 1702, nel Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolto a Lothrop Hill Cemetery, Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Joseph Lathropが1624年4月11日にイギリスケントエアストウエルで洗礼を受けた時，父John Lothropは39歳，母Hannah Howseは29歳であった。1650年12月11日にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーバーンスタブルでMary Anselと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1702年12月11日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーバーンスタブルバーンスタブルで78歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州バーンスタブルバーンスタブルロスロップ ヒル セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joseph Lathrop(이)가 1624년 4월 11일 영국 켄트 이스트웰에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그의 아버지 John Lothrop(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Hannah Howse(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1650년 12월 11일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 바른스타블일에서 Mary Ansel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1702년 12월 11일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 바른스타블일에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 바른스타블일 바른스타블일 로스럽 힐 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joseph Lathrop foi batizado em 11 de abril de 1624, em Eastwell, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Lothrop, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Hannah Howse, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Ansel em 11 de dezembro de 1650, em Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 11 de dezembro de 1702, em Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 78 anos, e foi sepultado em Lothrop Hill Cemetery, Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joseph Lathrop был крещен 11 апреля 1624 г. в местности эаствелл, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени John Lothrop было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Hannah Howse, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Ansel 11 декабря 1650 г. в местности барнстабл, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 11 декабря 1702 г. в местности барнстабл, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности лотроп хилл кеметири, барнстабл, барнстабл, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

Se casó con Mary Ansel el 11 de diciembre de 1650, en Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 4 hijas.
